settings.subtitle: Our Craft
settings.title: Precision in Every Thread
settings.text:
We combine cutting-edge computerized embroidery technology with artisan design sensibility. Each piece undergoes meticulous quality checks to ensure the stitching is flawless and the fabric feels premium against your skin.

From concept to finished garment, every step is handled with care — because we believe what you wear should be as intentional as how you live.

settings.subtitle: Our Process
settings.title: From Concept to Creation
settings.description: Every piece goes through a meticulous 4-step process to ensure perfection.

settings.title: Design
settings.text: Original artwork created by our in-house design team, digitized for embroidery perfection.

settings.title: Embroider
settings.text: 1,000+ stitches per minute with computerized precision. Every thread placed intentionally.

settings.title: Quality Check
settings.text: Each piece inspected for stitch density, color accuracy, and fabric integrity before packing.

settings.title: Deliver
settings.text: Carefully packed and shipped to your doorstep. Unwrap your wearable art.

settings.subtitle: Full Range
settings.title: All Products
settings.description: Every piece in our collection — premium embroidery, premium fabric, premium feel.

settings.text: The embroidery quality is insane. You can feel the craftsmanship the moment you hold the tee. It's not just a t-shirt, it's art you can wear.
settings.author: Rahul S.

settings.text: Ordered two oversized tees. The stitching detail is next level and the fabric feels premium. 240 GSM cotton that actually lasts. Worth every rupee.
settings.author: Priya M.

settings.text: Finally a brand that does embroidery right. Clean designs, great fit, fast delivery. Already ordered my third piece. This is my go-to now.
settings.author: Arjun K.

settings.title: Join the Thread
